chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-1310 of 2022. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 16.12.2022. Mr. Muhammad Saleem Chohan advocate for applicant. Mr. Imran Ali Abbasi Assistant Prosecutor General. ORDER MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J:- During patrolling, the police of PS Sanghar arrested applicant on 23.11.2022 at 1530 hours from his otaque near Depu Gali Sanghar City and from him allegedly 46 bags of Supari each weighing 10 kilograms, 15 packets of Safina Gutka, 20 packets of Maalai Gutka, and 15 packets of JND Gutka were recovered. He was brought at PS where he has been booked in the present case. Learned counsel for applicant submits that the applicant is innocent; the case has been challaned; he is no more required for further investigation and offence does not fall within the prohibitory clause of Section 497 CrPC. His arguments have been opposed by learned APG but he has admitted that there is no CRO of applicant and after submission of Challan he is no more required for further investigation. Accordingly on the grounds taken by learned defence counsel in his arguments, the bail application is allowed and the applicant is granted post-arrest bail subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (fifty thousand rupees) and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of learned trial Court. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial court while deciding the case on merits. JUDGE Irfan Ali
